# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the build artifact')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVER', defaultValue: '', description: 'IP or hostname of the deployment server')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: '', description: 'Username for deployment server')
        password(name: 'DEPLOY_PASSWORD', defaultValue: '', description: 'Password for deployment server')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFile = "artifact.zip"
                    sh "wget -O ${artifactFile} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'your-ssh-key-id', keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY')]) {
                    script {
                        sh "scp -i ${SSH_KEY} ${artifactFile} ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${params.DEPLOY_SERVER}:/path/to/deploy"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
